channel.title: NYT > Most Recent Headlines
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026 The New York Times Company

item.title: En busca de la película que define a Estados Unidos
item.description: Diez escritores exploran los filmes que capturan las esperanzas, los sueños, las desilusiones y la hilaridad de un país que cumple 250 años.
item.dc:creator: The New York Times

item.title: La guerra llega a las gasolineras de Rusia
item.description: “¿Ahora estamos en la Unión Soviética?”, preguntó una mujer rusa, atónita y frustrada por las esperas para cargar combustible.
item.dc:creator: Nataliya Vasilyeva

media:content.media:credit: Alexander Nemenov/Agence France-Presse — Getty Images
media:content.media:description: Filas en una gasolinera de Moscú el martes. Los ataques contra la infraestructura petrolera rusa han provocado una escasez de gasolina como muchos ciudadanos rusos no habían visto en toda su vida.

item.title: A Look at the Many Knicks Murals That Popped Up After the Championship
item.description: To celebrate the team, most Knicks fans bought hats and T-shirts. For New York’s street artists, a different kind of impulse took hold.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Keh

media:content.media:credit: Amir Hamja for The New York Times

item.title: Fourth of July Weekend Presents a Huge Logistical Challenge for New York
item.description: A flurry of major events is expected to draw large crowds, requiring extensive planning and security preparations. Oh, and there’s also a heat wave.
item.dc:creator: Benjamin Oreskes and Chelsia Rose Marcius

media:content.media:credit: Lucia Vazquez for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Tall ships traveled past the East River Esplanade in Manhattan during Sail4th 250 on Friday. Dozens of vessels are set to take part in a parade on the Hudson River on Saturday.

item.title: NYT Spelling Bee Answers for July 4, 2026
item.description: Feeling stuck on today’s puzzle? We can help.
item.dc:creator: New York Times Games

item.title: How Mamdani Sees the World Through Soccer
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani says that the sport embodies his political identity, even as the World Cup has been colored by corporate greed and geopolitical concerns.
item.dc:creator: Benjamin Oreskes

media:content.media:credit: Roshni Khatri for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani views soccer as a sport that fits his democratic socialist ideals.

item.title: Why Loving Good-Bad Movies Feels All Good
item.description: A pop culture reporter explains why she revels in debating movies that cross the line from bad to sublime.
item.dc:creator: Maya Salam

item.title: Storms Cause Power Outages for 1 Million in Midwest, Northeast and Ontario
item.description: Strong winds from thunderstorms caused widespread cuts as the region sweltered in a heat wave.
item.dc:creator: John Yoon

media:content.media:credit: Robert Killips/Lansing State Journal, via USA Today, via Imagn Images, via Reuters
media:content.media:description: Large tree branches came down during a storm in Lansing, Mich. on Friday.

item.title: Trump me arruinó el 4 de julio
item.description: Se ha esfumado esa idea inspiradora de que todo el mundo es bienvenido a la fiesta de Estados Unidos: amigos, familia y también los recién llegados.
item.dc:creator: Robin Givhan
item.category: Obama, Barack H, Presidential Library and Museum

media:content.media:credit: Sam Gulliver para The New York Times

item.title: Los mejores consejos para comer saludable en 2026
item.description: Analizamos las noticias más destacadas del año sobre nutrición para extraer 10 lecciones útiles.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Schupak

item.title: Australia Tried to Push Back on China. China Pushed Harder.
item.description: Relations between Beijing and Canberra have improved over the past four years, but China’s ambassador is now warning of a ‘Cold War mentality.”
item.dc:creator: Victoria Kim and Lily Kuo

media:content.media:credit: David Gray/Agence France-Presse — Getty Images
media:content.media:description: The director-general of the Australian Security Intelligence Organization, Mike Burgess, at the agency’s headquarters in Canberra in June. He has warned about foreign interference in Australia.

item.title: Quote of the Day: One Nation, Many Americas
item.description: Quotation of the Day for Saturday, July 4, 2026.

item.title: Funeral Procession for Khamenei Will Visit 5 Cities in Iran and Iraq
item.description: After lying in state in Tehran, Mr. Khamenei’s body will be taken to some of the holiest sites in Shiite Islam during a four-day procession that is expected to draw millions.
item.dc:creator: Leo Sands
item.category: US and Israeli Attack on Iran (2026)

media:content.media:credit: Arash Khamooshi/Polaris for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Preparations being made for the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Tehran on Thursday.

item.title: Scenes From Taylor Swift’s NYC Wedding: Fans, Stars and More
item.description: The scene outside Taylor Swift’s wedding in Manhattan had the drama and emotion of one of her albums.
item.dc:creator: Madison Malone Kircher and Emma G. Fitzsimmons

media:content.media:credit: Lanna Apisukh for The New York Times

item.title: ‘JusT&T Married’: lo que pasó fuera de la boda de Taylor Swift y Travis Kelce
item.description: La celebración privada de la pareja se convirtió en todo un espectáculo público a las puertas del Madison Square Garden.
item.dc:creator: The New York Times

media:content.media:credit: Jutharat Pinyodoonyachet for The New York Times

item.title: ¿Por qué Adam Sandler ofició la boda de Swift y Kelce?
item.description: El actor desempeñó un papel especial (y para algunos sorprendente) en la unión.
item.dc:creator: Jesse McKinley

media:content.media:credit: Matt Winkelmeyer/Getty Images for Palm Springs International Film Society
media:content.media:description: Adam Sandler en los Premios Internacionales de Cine de Palm Springs, en enero. Un representante de Taylor Swift confirmó que el actor ofició la boda de la estrella del pop.

item.title: Sewage Spills Into Hudson River After Power Failure at Treatment Plant
item.description: The spill, at a plant just north of New York City, continued from Thursday night to Friday afternoon. It was not expected to affect the city’s Fourth of July celebrations.
item.dc:creator: Andy Newman and Hilary Howard

media:content.media:credit: Carolina Herrera for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: The Hudson River off Manhattan on Thursday, the day before a sewage spill at a plant just north of the city.

item.title: Photos: See Outside Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding at MSG
item.description: The couple’s private celebration created a public spectacle outside Madison Square Garden.
item.dc:creator: The New York Times

media:content.media:credit: Jutharat Pinyodoonyachet for The New York Times

item.title: Steamed
item.description: Kareem Ayas provides an action-packed themeless puzzle.
item.dc:creator: Caitlin Lovinger

media:content.media:credit: Giuseppe Cacace/Agence France-Presse — Getty Images
media:content.media:description: You’ll need to be nimble to navigate today’s grid.

item.title: Trump Pardons Violators of the Clean Air Act and a Major Donor
item.description: The president used his clemency power to further undermine environmental laws and to help a political supporter who pleaded guilty in a fraud involving Jack Abramoff.
item.dc:creator: Kenneth P. Vogel and Karen Zraick

media:content.media:credit: Acacia Johnson for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: One of the pardoned men was Mackenzie Spurlock, of Wasilla, Alaska, who had been charged with removing emissions controls from vehicles.

item.title: Why Did Adam Sandler Officiate Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding?
item.description: The actor played a special — and surprising to some — role in the Swift-Kelce nuptials.
item.dc:creator: Jesse McKinley

media:content.media:credit: Matt Winkelmeyer/Getty Images for Palm Springs International Film Society
media:content.media:description: Adam Sandler at the Palm Springs International Film Awards in January. A representative for Taylor Swift confirmed that the actor officiated the pop star’s nuptials.

item.title: Defeated at the World Cup, Teams Sometimes Face Abuse and Violence
item.description: Anger and disappointment are not unusual for fans whose teams are knocked out. But some responses have been extreme.
item.dc:creator: Qasim Nauman

media:content.media:credit: Ahn Young-Joon/Associated Press

item.title: Dior viste de novia a Taylor Swift y se lleva el premio mayor
item.description: La estrella del pop dijo “Sí, acepto” con un vestido diseñado por Jonathan Anderson, el director creativo de la casa francesa.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Friedman

media:content.media:credit: Federico Sorrentino para The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Jonathan Anderson, que se incorporó a Dior el año pasado, tiene el encargo de revitalizar su imagen a nivel mundial.

item.title: Travis Kelce Twins With Taylor in Dior
item.description: Both in couture looks by Jonathan Anderson, the couple showed they were on the same page.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Friedman and Joseph Bernstein

media:content.media:credit: Chris Graythen/Getty Images
media:content.media:description: Travis Kelce doesn’t mind taking fashion risks, but for his wedding he went with one of the most storied French fashion houses.

item.title: 3 Dead After Boat Capsizes on Wisconsin Lake During Severe Storm
item.description: Seven others were rescued from the waters of Geneva Lake, southwest of Milwaukee, the authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Mark Walker and Amy Graff

media:content.media:credit: The New York Times

item.title: Taylor Swift y Travis Kelce ya están casados
item.description: La pareja dio a conocer la noticia a través de un anuncio digital en el exterior del Madison Square Garden, así como con un comunicado de prensa de su publicista.
item.dc:creator: Madison Malone Kircher

media:content.media:credit: Jutharat Pinyodoonyachet para The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Taylor Swift y Travis Kelce anunciaron su boda en un anuncio digital en el exterior del Madison Square Garden.

item.title: Putin Visits Battlefield and Vows to Take More of Ukraine
item.description: The Russian leader denounced Ukraine’s “imaginary achievements” on the battlefield of late, calling its leaders “play actors.”
item.dc:creator: Paul Sonne

media:content.media:credit: Agence France-Presse — Getty Images
media:content.media:description: Black smoke rose above residential buildings in Moscow last month following a drone attack from Ukraine.

item.title: With Its Celebrity Guests, Taylor Swift’s Wedding Rivals the Met Gala
item.description: Top-secret celebrity guest lists! No cell phones! Big fashion moments! S.U.V.s galore! New York usually gets only one party like this a year.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Friedman

media:content.media:credit: TheStewartofNY/GC Images, via Getty Images; Brendan Mcdermid/Reuters; Backgrid

item.title: Taylor Swift Wears Dior Dress by Jonathan Anderson for MSG Wedding
item.description: The pop star said “I do” to a gown designed by Jonathan Anderson, the French house’s creative director.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Friedman

media:content.media:credit: Federico Sorrentino for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Jonathan Anderson, who joined Dior just last year, has been charged with revitalizing its global profile.

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Are Married
item.description: The couple shared the news through a digital advertisement outside Madison Square Garden, as well as a news release from Swift’s longtime publicist.
item.dc:creator: Madison Malone Kircher

media:content.media:credit: Jutharat Pinyodoonyachet for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce announced their nuptials on a digital advertisement outside Madison Square Garden.

item.title: Trump Takes Stock of Other Presidencies, Shedding Light on His Own
item.description: In his second term, the president has increasingly mused about his predecessors, comparing himself with some and distancing from the failures of others.
item.dc:creator: Aishvarya Kavi

media:content.media:credit: Doug Mills/The New York Times
media:content.media:description: A new painting of President Trump in the cabinet room of the White House.

item.title: Fans Brave N.Y.C. Heat for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding
item.description: Swifties hung around Madison Square Garden in scorching temperatures to try to catch a glimpse of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding festivities. About 1,000 guests are expected to attend their wedding on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Fetherston, Jorge Mitssunaga, Bethlehem Feleke and Jeremy Raff

media:content.media:credit: Jutharat Pinyodoonyachet for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Black SUVs arrive near Madison Square Garden as part of a well-orchestrated transportation plan for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s celebration.

item.title: Dear Americans, How Well Do You Know Canada?
item.description: The Canada-U.S. relationship has had an interesting year and a half: a quiz to test how much Americans know about their northern neighbor.
item.dc:creator: Shawna Richer

media:content.media:credit: Chris Wattie/Reuters

item.title: ¿Cuánto cuesta alquilar el Madison Square Garden?
item.description: La boda de Taylor Swift y Travis Kelce obligaría a cerrar calles, desplegar cientos de agentes y asumir costos públicos y privados de gran escala en Nueva York.
item.dc:creator: Alisha Haridasani Gupta, Ishani Desai, Maria Cramer and Maia Coleman

media:content.media:credit: Jutharat Pinyodoonyachet para The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Preparativos en el Madison Square Garden el jueves.

item.title: Parents Will Be Able to Enroll Newborns in Trump Accounts at the Hospital
item.description: The Social Security Administration will introduce a process to sign up babies for the investment program at the same time they are registered for a Social Security number.
item.dc:creator: Tara Siegel Bernard

media:content.media:credit: Tierney L. Cross/The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Frank J. Bisignano, the Social Security Administration commissioner, said parents would be able to take advantage of the Trump accounts “from the day a child is born.”

item.title: Celebrating America’s 250th Anniversary Across the Country
item.description: Even as an oppressive heat wave stifled much of the United States, the nationwide party continued.
item.dc:creator: The New York Times

media:content.media:credit: Desiree Rios for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Families watching a fireworks display in Mansfield, Texas, on Thursday.

item.title: America Unites for a Day of Grand 250th Celebrations
item.description: From large events in the biggest cities to small-town gatherings to backyard barbecues, a divided America is finding many ways to salute itself.
item.dc:creator: Michael Levenson

media:content.media:credit: Rachel Wisniewski for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Caleb, left, and Joshua Fendrick, traveled with their family from Florida to march in Philadelphia’s parade on Friday, but it was canceled because of excessive heat. The city has other celebrations scheduled for Saturday.

item.title: Swimmer Is Injured at Jones Beach in Possible Shark Attack
item.description: The swimmer was treated for a minor foot injury after being bitten by “unknown marine life,” New York State officials said.
item.dc:creator: Santul Nerkar

media:content.media:credit: Michael M. Santiago/Getty Images
media:content.media:description: New York officials have embraced the use of drones to scan waterways for sharks, which has led to an increase in sightings.

item.title: Trump Targets Not Just Georgia’s Vote, but Also Trust in Elections
item.description: The president has sent 260 F.B.I. analysts to Georgia, repeating his baseless claims of fraud in 2020. But critics say the intention is to undermine overall confidence in the electoral process.
item.dc:creator: Zolan Kanno-Youngs

media:content.media:credit: Nicole Craine for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: An F.B.I. agent entering the Fulton County elections office in Union City, Ga., in January.

item.title: What Time Is Taylor Swift Getting Married? See the Wedding Schedule at MSG.
item.description: An internal memo for the New York Police Department laid out a schedule of events for a 1,000-person celebration on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Emma G. Fitzsimmons

media:content.media:credit: Jutharat Pinyodoonyachet for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Black SUVs arrive near Madison Square Garden as part of a well-orchestrated transportation plan for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s celebration.

item.title: Taylor Swift y Travis Kelce ya están casados, y la fiesta en el MSG transcurre repleta de estrellas
item.description: Adam Sandler ofició la ceremonia. Tanto la novia como el novio vistieron de Dior. Y hasta 1000 de los amigos más cercanos (y famosos) de la pareja están de fiesta dentro del estadio de Nueva York.
item.dc:creator: The New York Times

media:content.media:credit: Ashley Landis/Associated Press

item.title: Live Updates: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Are Married at Star-Studded M.S.G. Bash
item.description: Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony. The bride and groom both wore Dior. And up to 1,000 of the couple’s closest (and most famous) friends celebrated inside the New York arena.
item.dc:creator: The New York Times

media:content.media:credit: Jutharat Pinyodoonyachet for The New York Times
